name: Peter Winkler Golf
about: Peter Winkler Golf is a golf instruction and club fitting business located at Meadow Lake Golf Club in Keithville, Louisiana. With over 40 years of experience, the facility combines traditional golf instruction with modern technology, offering video analysis, training aids, and custom club fittings. The venue operates an outdoor driving range and short game area, with an indoor golf simulation bay powered by Rapsodo and E6 software. Custom fittings are available from major brands including TaylorMade, Ping, Mizuno, Avoda, Sub 70, Edel, LAB, and SeeMore. Peter Winkler Golf also manages the on-site 9-hole Meadow Lake Golf Club, built in 1959 and acquired in 2001.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade launch monitor technology for accurate club fitting
Comprehensive custom fitting services with major brand partnerships
Indoor and outdoor practice facilities with video swing analysis
Foot golf and fling golf options for alternative golf experiences
40+ years of expertise in golf instruction and club fitting

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though the facility specializes in custom club fittings. Bringing your own clubs is recommended for personalized fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned on the website. No BYOB policy is specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility features a 9-hole golf course (Meadow Lake Golf Club), so 18 holes would typically require playing two complete rounds.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Peter Winkler Golf offers junior golf programs and foot golf options, making it suitable for families and young golfers.
